restaurants.name: Lady Bee
restaurants.hours: 06:00 PM- 11:30 PM; closed on Sunday and Monday, open until 1:00 AM on Friday and Saturday
restaurants.ambience: One of the best cocktail bars globally, dedicated to quality ingredients from Amazon
highlights: Considered one of the best cocktail bars globally
